special_mechanics.name: Cursor Control
special_mechanics.description: International versions feature faster cursor movement compared to Japanese version

special_mechanics.name: Torch Mechanics
special_mechanics.description: Player must maintain at least one lit torch at all times. Torches represent a time limit mechanism

special_mechanics.name: Weightlessness Effect
special_mechanics.description: Temporary state where player feels weightless and vulnerable to being blown away by small breeze

tier_notes: Tier 2 - Shadowgate is a first-person point-and-click adventure game, not a traditional platformer. Physics data is not the primary design focus. Available documentation covers gameplay mechanics, story, regional differences, and debug features, but contains no quantified movement or physics parameters. The game features puzzle-solving and navigation rather than character physics.
